text:
Saoirse Ronan did not win an Academy Award for Lady Bird.

For Lady Bird, she was nominated for:
- Best Actress — Saoirse Ronan
- Best Picture
- Best Director — Greta Gerwig
- Best Original Screenplay
- Best Supporting Actress — Laurie Metcalf

Lady Bird received 5 Oscar nominations and won 0.

If you want, I can help you phrase this elegantly for on-stage remarks so it still sounds celebratory and polished.
